summary: Senior IT Support Professional with 5 years of progressive experience in fast-paced technical environments, including 1 year in a leadership role managing escalations and mentoring team members. Proven track record of delivering exceptional customer service while solving complex technical challenges for high-profile users across multiple locations. Demonstrated leadership through training and development of IT technicians across international teams spanning North America and Latin America. Excel at project management and critical problem resolution, consistently delivering solutions that minimize downtime and maximize user productivity. Known for reliability and commitment to excellence, consistently meeting tight deadlines while maintaining high service quality standards.

experience.title: Senior Support Technician, IT Operations
experience.description: Lead incident response coordination and manage technical operations for a global consulting firm.
achievements: Lead incident response coordination, mobilizing team resources and directing critical issue resolution under tight deadlines
Manage ticket queue delegation and provide technical guidance to junior team members on complex cases
Serve as primary escalation point for Tier 3 technical issues, leveraging deep company knowledge to deliver solutions
Participate in Senior Operations Team strategic planning, contributing to process improvements and team optimization
Represent IT Operations in executive-level Business Services meetings, interfacing directly with C-suite leadership
Lead technical projects including Intune automation development and Logic App implementations for operational efficiency
Mentor and develop junior technicians through hands-on guidance and knowledge transfer

experience.title: Support Technician, IT Operations
experience.description: Provided comprehensive technical support to North America users while monitoring global security operations.
achievements: Resolved 20+ daily incidents and service requests ranging from Tier 1 account management to Tier 3 network outages
Provided technical support to North America users while monitoring and responding to global security alerts
Mentored new team members and served as go-to resource for complex technical questions
Implemented and documented new IT processes to improve team efficiency
Selected to provide training to South American IT technicians in Colombia (February 2023)
Presented webinars and training sessions on new systems including MFA and Office 365

experience.title: Junior Network Administrator
experience.description: Temporary position supporting network infrastructure and system migrations.
achievements: Led Windows 7 to Windows 10 migration project, successfully upgrading 80+ workstations
Deployed system images and migrated user data using Windows Migration Wizard

education.details: Specialized in scripting/programming (Python, JavaScript, PowerShell) and network/server administration. Developed web-based applications and gained hands-on experience with Windows and Linux systems.

certifications.name: Microsoft Certified: Power Platform Fundamentals PL-900
Microsoft Certified: Power BI Data Analyst Associate PL-300
